title: Catalog Designer

We need a designer to build two clean, professional product catalogs that match the quality of our reference example (attached PDF). Catalog 1 — Cabinets & Accessories Cabinet door styles / finishes overview pages Construction spec page (exploded cabinet diagram with callouts for box, drawer, hinge, slides, etc.) Product spec tables by category: wall, base, tall, vanity, ADA Pull-outs, inserts & accessories (roll-out trays, lazy susans, spice racks, trash bases, cutlery inserts, etc.) Moldings, fillers, panels, decorative hardware Catalog 2 — Stone / Quartz Countertops Color/slab showcase pages Specs (thickness, finishes, edge profiles, slab sizes) Same look and feel as Catalog 1 so they read as one brand family What we'll provide: Product photos / renders Full SKU lists and spec data (dimensions, finishes, item codes) Logo, brand colors, fonts (or we'll work with you to lock these down) Reference: See attached PDF — this is the level of polish, layout, and table organization we're after. Not a copy, but a strong benchmark. You should ha

title: Catchy Water Bottle Label Design
desc: I need a fresh set of water-bottle labels that feel playful and instantly catch the eye of brewery and restaurant patrons. The look we’re after is colorful, bright, and bold— nothing muted or vintage—so please lean into lively palettes, dynamic shapes, and fun typography. The label must keep our brand logo and the product name front and center; everything else can be treated as supportive design elements. I’ll supply logo files, dielines, and a short creative brief the moment we kick off. From there, I’d like to collaborate through two or three quick review rounds to make sure the artwork reflects the quirky, upbeat personality we’ve established for our clients. Deliverables • Two initial concepts presented as flat mock-ups • One final print-ready file (AI or layered PSD + PDF) sized to the provided dieline • All linked fonts and graphics in an organized package I work in Adobe Illustrator, so an .ai master file keeps hand-offs simple, but if you prefer Photoshop that’s fine as long as layers remain editable. If bright, bold, and playful label design is in your wheelhouse, let’s talk and get these bottles looking great.

title: Coffee Table Book Layout - Text, Photos, Captions, some Graphics
desc: "Coffee Table" Book interior layout needed. I have the full manuscript, including all photos and captions to be included. Project will be from table of contents through full layout, appendix, etc. It is a 11.5" x 8", full color book. Will require some design work for chapter title pages, pull quotes, placement of photos and captions in a meaningful way, a family tree designed (I have a mock-up). I would like to start with one chapter as a design test before proceeding with the entire book - that way we know the project look and feel and the Client can also approve that direction. I am in the process of getting the final file specifications from the printer/publisher so we know how final format needs to be presented. I would like to do a fixed price contract that includes the test design (and revisions to get the look and feel right), full layout, a round or two of revisions once the full layout is complete, final formatting to printer specifications, and delivery. This is a "rush job" and I am willing to pay a higher rate to get this completed quickly. Note: this book is NOT being published on Amazon or with KDP, we are using an independent publisher and printer.

title: Create Online DoorDash Menu
desc: We are seeking a skilled freelancer to design and create an online menu for our DoorDash platform. The ideal candidate will have experience in creating visually appealing and user-friendly menus that enhance the customer experience. Responsibilities include designing the layout, ensuring easy navigation, and incorporating essential menu details. The goal is to create a menu that attracts customers and reflects our brand's identity.

title: Create a Digital Menu Design Board for restaurant
desc: Digital Menu Board Designer Needed – Restaurant Menu Screens (3 Screens) We’re looking for an experienced designer to create 3 professional digital menu board screens for our restaurant, Mama’s Pizza. This is for our main in-store menu display, so the design needs to be clean, visually strong, easy to read from a distance, and built with strong menu psychology that helps drive higher sales. ### What We Need: - 3 main digital menu board screens designed - Professional, high-converting restaurant menu layout - Strong use of menu psychology (highlighting profitable items, combos, upsells, etc.) - Clean, modern design that still fits our authentic New York-style family pizzeria brand - Easy readability for customers ordering in-store - Organized layout for pizzas, slices, appetizers, pasta, specials, etc. - Final files that are editable for future price/item updates ### Style: We are an old-school authentic New York-style pizza restaurant with a family feel. Branding should feel premium, warm, and established — not cheap or overly corporate. ### Requirements: - Must have previous experience designing restaurant digital menu boards - Must provide reference work / portfolio of past menu board projects - Must understand restaurant menu psychology and customer buying behavior - Strong co

title: Creative modern menu designer for takeaways & restaurants
desc: We are seeking a talented designer to create a visually appealing and functional menu for our takeaway restaurant. The ideal candidate will have experience in menu design and be able to deliver a high-quality, print-ready design. The menu should be easy to read and include all necessary information such as dish names, descriptions, and prices. The design should align with our brand identity and appeal to our target audience.

title: Desain Grafis & Artikel Blog
desc: Saya sedang membuka peluang kerja lepas untuk membantu saya menambah penghasilan melalui konten visual dan tulisan pendukung yang siap dijual atau dipublikasikan. Apa yang saya butuhkan: • 5–7 aset desain grafis orisinal (banner, poster, feed Instagram, atau template digital lain) lengkap dengan file sumber terbuka—Adobe Illustrator atau Photoshop. • 5 artikel atau posting blog (300-500 kata per artikel) yang relevan dengan masing-masing desain, ditulis dalam Bahasa Indonesia yang lugas dan menarik. • Setiap desain dan artikel harus benar-benar orisinal, bebas hak cipta, serta mudah disesuaikan untuk klien atau marketplace berbeda. Kriteria keberhasilan: – Visual terlihat profesional di desktop maupun perangkat seluler. – Teks informatif, tanpa kesalahan tata bahasa, dan mengandung kata kunci kreatif yang alami. – Semua berkas terstruktur rapi, diserahkan dalam format .ai/.psd serta .png/.jpg, sementara artikel dalam .docx atau Google Docs. Jika kamu seorang desainer grafis & kreatif yang nyaman bekerja lepas dan mampu menulis Artikel & Blog singkat, saya menantikan portofoliomu dan perkiraan waktu pengerjaan.

title: Design Sticker for Pasta Sauce Jar
desc: We are seeking a talented graphic designer to create a sticker for our pasta sauce jar. The design should be eye-catching and appealing, incorporating our brand's colors and logo. The sticker will be used on a 12 oz jar, so the dimensions should be suitable for that size. We are looking for a design that will stand out on store shelves and attract customers. If you have experience in packaging design and a creative flair, we would love to see your proposal!

title: Design for Recipe Booklet
desc: I need a designer to take an AI-generated recipe and wine pairing booklet and give it final touches, creating a print-ready version quickly. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and layout, ensuring the final product is visually appealing and professional.

title: Designer needed to create Professional looking restaurant menu
desc: Looking for a creative designer who can help take over a professional look of restaunat menu convert the HTML menu to a print ready PDF file with our desiger with a little bit of a twick. I need someone who could do the job as soon as possible.

title: Digital Menu Design
desc: We are seeking a skilled graphic designer to create a digital animated and paper menu for our restaurant. The ideal candidate will have experience in designing visually appealing and user-friendly menus that effectively communicate our offerings. The design should be modern, clean, and align with our brand identity. The project involves creating a menu that is easy to navigate and highlights our unique dishes.

title: Digital Menu Design and Animation for Restaurant
desc: Looking for a freelancer from Tamil Nadu to design and animate a digital menu for a restaurant. The menu will be displayed on 5 TV screens. Deliverables include creative designs and animations tailored to the restaurant's theme.

title: Digital Signage Menu Design
desc: We are looking for an experienced Digital Signage and Restaurant Menu Design Specialist to create a professional digital menu system for our restaurant. Our restaurant uses 4 TV screens, and we need someone who can design, organize, and optimize content across all displays to create an attractive, easy-to-read, and effective customer experience. Scope of Work The selected freelancer will: Design a complete digital menu layout for 4 TV screens. Recommend the best content strategy and screen organization. Create visually appealing menu boards that are easy to read from a distance. Ensure pricing, menu items, promotions, and categories are clearly displayed. Optimize designs for customer flow and purchasing decisions. Create a consistent branding experience across all screens. Design screen layouts that work well during busy restaurant hours. Incorporate high-quality food imagery where appropriate. Ensure menus remain legible and attractive on large-format displays. Create templates that can be easily updated in the future. Advise on digital signage best practices, including content hierarchy, readability, typography, color selection, and customer attention patterns. Provide final files in editable formats. Desired Experience Please apply only if you have experience with: Restaurant

title: Drink Menu Design for Restaurant
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a visually appealing drink menu for our restaurant. The menu should be easy to read and feature our signature cocktails, wine, and beer. The design should align with our restaurant's theme and be suitable for printing. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and a strong portfolio of previous work.

title: Experienced Amazon & eBay Manager Required to Launch and Grow Australian eCommerce Brand
desc: We have recently launched our Australian online store, Kitchen & Home Co., and we are looking for an experienced eCommerce specialist to help us establish and grow our presence on Amazon and eBay. We are interested in your services to assist with: • Amazon Australia store setup and management • eBay Australia store setup and management • Product listing creation and optimization • SEO-friendly titles, descriptions, and keywords • Inventory synchronization with Shopify • Marketplace integration and automation • Order management and customer service processes • Advertising and sales growth strategies Initially, we have around 50–150 products across kitchenware, homeware, cleaning, coffee & tea, and lunchbox categories, with plans to expand significantly over the coming months. Could you please provide: Your recommended approach for a new Australian business. Your pricing structure (hourly, monthly, or project-based). Examples of Amazon and eBay stores you currently manage. An estimated timeline to get our stores fully operational. I look forward to hearing Kind regards, Syed Awais Raza Kitchen & Home Co. Australia

title: Experienced Menu Designer Needed for Restaurant Menu
desc: e are looking for an experienced graphic designer to create a professionally designed menu for our restaurant. The menu needs to be modern, clear, easy to read, and visually appealing, while matching our restaurant’s branding and overall style. We are looking for someone with strong experience designing restaurant menus, food layouts, print-ready files, and digital menu formats. What we need: * Design of one restaurant menu must be on adobe illustrator * Clean, professional, and easy-to-read layout * Strong food/menu design experience * Consistent branding with our restaurant * Print-ready file * Editable source file * Digital version suitable for online use * Ability to work with our existing logo, colours, menu items, and pricing Ideal candidate: * Has previous experience designing restaurant menus * Can show examples of past menu design work * Understands food presentation and hospitality branding * Has strong attention to detail * Can complete revisions quickly * Communicates clearly and professionally Please include examples of previous restaurant menu designs in your application. We are ready to start as soon as we find the right designer.

title: Fast Casual Restaurant TV Menu Design
desc: Oke Poke is a fast casual, family-owned Hawaiian Poke restaurant. Our restaurants have a clean and modern feel with walnut wood accents, white tiles, and light greenery. Our brand colors of red, white and black are seamlessly incorporated into the aesthetic. We are converting 3x 55" horizontally mounted TV menus to 5x 55" vertical menu displays. I've attached the 3 current menus (Screens 1-3) that are displayed, along with 2 additional menus we are looking to incorporate (Poke Nachos Menu and Signature Menu). I've also attached a couple of store interior shots for reference. We are seeking well-designed menus that enhances our current menu setup. The new menus will maintain the look and feel of our brand but will be a significant visual improvement. Please visit our website okepoke.com and our Instagram @okepokeco for a better visual of our brand. We would like final deliverables within 1-2 weeks. Must have restaurant menu design experience and a portfolio to back it.

title: Fast-Food Menu Illustrator Design
desc: I need a sharp, modern menu designed in Adobe Illustrator for a fast-food restaurant. We already have a full brand style guide, so the colors, fonts, and overall layout imagery from that guide must come through clearly in the final piece. Scope • Design a clean, eye-catching menu that organizes items, descriptions, and prices in a way that is easy to read at a glance. • Reflect our fast-food vibe while staying 100 % on brand—use the specified color palette, typography, and visual hierarchy from our guide. • Prepare both an editable .AI file for future updates and a press-ready PDF for immediate printing. What I’m looking for You’re comfortable in Adobe Illustrator and have an eye for typography, spacing, and hierarchy. Past work creating restaurant menus, brochures, or other print collateral will stand out. Accuracy and attention to detail matter; I don’t want to hunt for missing fonts or relink images later. Deliverables • Editable Adobe Illustrator (.AI) source • Print-ready PDF (CMYK, bleed, trim marks) • Folder with any custom fonts and linked assets Please attach or link to two or three recent menu or restaurant-related designs so I can quickly gauge fit. Excited to collaborate and get this menu off to the printers soon!

title: Flyer Design for Arabic Catering
desc: I need someone to design me a flyer for an Arabic Catering company (one man show) called "Damascus Cuisine". It offers the traditional Arabic food items, these should be visible as pictures on the flyer: mezze, kibbeh, hummous, moutabbal, freekeh, mansaf, etc.. We then add a Phone number and an email address, that's it. It's for a friend who's fulfilling his dream to be self-employed and I am helping him. Thank you for your offers! And I need it within 2 days from now, he has his first gig on Saturday and he wants to use the flyers.

title: Graphic Design & Formatting for 3-4 Page Tech Proposal (Divine Dustbin)
desc: We are seeking a senior graphic designer or creative agency (with an interest in sustainability and tech) to format our finalized text into a high-end, visually compelling 3-to-4 page business proposal PDF for our green-tech project: "The Divine Dustbin." This is an innovative, smart recycling hardware initiative. The finalized document will be used to pitch directly to high-stakes audiences, including local government councils, university partners, grant funding panels, and commercial high-street businesses (restaurants/shops). Scope of Work & Deliverables: Premium Layout: Transform raw text into a sleek, corporate, tech-forward layout using clean visual boxes, containers, and icons to keep it punchy and spacious. Length: Strictly 3 to 4 pages maximum so it is easy for busy executives to read. Brand Aesthetic: A cohesive palette featuring Deep Forest Green (eco/sustainability) mixed with Sleek Dark Gray/Black and Premium White (hardware/AI technology). What we are looking for in a work relationship: We want a true creative partner who genuinely cares about the success of this project. Clear, responsive communication is essential. Before we officially hit the "Hire" button and set up the payment escrow, we want to have a quick text discussion or brief call via Upwork messages to

title: Graphic Design Menu for Coffee Shop
desc: I need someone to help create a new graphic design menu for my coffee shop. The ideal candidate will have experience in menu design and be able to deliver a visually appealing and functional menu. The project is part-time and requires intermediate proficiency.

title: Graphic Designer

desc: Graphic Designer & Video Content Creator Full-Time | Remote | $9–12 USD/hr NON NEGOTIABLE Monday–Friday | 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST Scale My Meal Prep is one of North America's fastest-growing agencies serving restaurant owners, caterers, and meal prep companies. This is a long-term position with opportunities for increased hours, bonuses, and advancement for the right candidate. What You'll Be Doing: Graphic Design * Facebook & Instagram Ads * Email Marketing Graphics * Shopify Store Graphics * Website Banners & Assets * Landing Page Graphics * Branding Assets * Promotional Creatives Video Editing & Creative Production * Short Form Video Ads * Reels & TikTok Content * UGC Style Ad Creation * Motion Graphics * Product Showcase Videos * Social Media Video Content * Video Resizing & Adaptation What We're Looking For: Non-Negotiables * Available Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST * Strong English communication skills * Reliable internet connection * Ability to follow delegation instructions accurately * Ability to work quickly with minimal revisions * Comfortable receiving feedback and implementing revisions Preferre

title: Graphic Designer Needed for Performance Meta Ads (Food & Beverage Brands)
desc: We are looking for a talented graphic designer to create 4 high-converting, scroll-stopping static image ads for a Food & Beverage brand focused on strong performance marketing across Meta (Facebook & Instagram). These ads will be used for paid social media advertising campaigns, so experience in direct-response creative design and performance marketing is highly preferred. Our goal is to create visuals that don’t just look good — they capture attention immediately, communicate value fast, and drive conversions. We are looking for a designer who understands how to create ads that stop the scroll within 1–2 seconds and are optimized for CTR and engagement. Project Scope Create 4 static image ads, each targeting a different food & beverage angle: 1. Product Highlight / Hero Offer Ad Target Goal: Showcase the main product in an appetizing, high-impact way that instantly grabs attention. Focus on: Visual appeal (texture, freshness, quality) Strong headline or hook Clear product positioning 2. Lifestyle / Emotional Consumption Ad Target Goal: Connect the product with a lifestyle moment (comfort, enjoyment, sharing, energy, etc.). Focus on: Emotional storytelling Relatable real-life scenarios Strong visual mood (warm, premium, or refreshing depending on brand) 3. Problem → Solution Ad

title: Graphic Designer Needed for Restaurant
desc: We are a growing restaurant business looking for a creative and reliable graphic designer to support our design needs. Scope of Work Design restaurant menus (print & digital) Create social media graphics (Instagram, Facebook, promotions, etc.) Ensure consistent brand identity across all designs Make revisions based on feedback Collaborate with our team on new design ideas Requirements Proven experience in graphic design (restaurant/food industry experience preferred) Strong portfolio showcasing menus and social media designs Proficiency in Adobe photoshop, Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, or similar tools Good communication skills and ability to meet deadlines How to Apply Please share: Your portfolio link A brief introduction about your experience Examples of restaurant or food-related designs (if available) We’re looking to build a long-term working relationship with the right designer. Looking forward to seeing your work!

title: Graphic Designer Needed for Restaurant Menu Finalization
desc: I have created a draft restaurant menu using AI, and I need a graphic designer to polish it and prepare the final editable file. The job includes: Making small design edits Applying consistency across all pages Improving layout, spacing, fonts, and overall visual balance Keeping the style clean, modern, and slightly traditional — around 90% modern / 10% traditional Delivering the final editable file The menu has 16 pages. I will provide all files, text, and sample pages I created. If interested, please send: Your quote for the full 16-page menu Your portfolio A sample redesign of one attached page, so I can see your style If the work is done well, more restaurant design jobs will follow.

title: Graphic Designer Needed for Two-Sided Restaurant Table Menu
desc: We are looking for an experienced graphic designer to design a two-sided restaurant table menu. The menu will be used both for professional printing and digital sharing, so the final design must be visually attractive, clear, readable, and technically suitable for print. The text of the menu is already prepared and will be provided in Italian. We will also provide the restaurant’s existing brand materials, including: - Logo - Brand colours - Fonts - Previous menu designs - Examples of menus we like Symbols/icons to be included, such as vegetarian, gluten-free, and frozen-food indicators. The required style is pop, premium, and highly readable. The menu should feel modern and distinctive, but the layout must remain practical and easy for customers to read. The designer will not need to rewrite or edit the menu text. The task is focused only on the graphic layout and final design. The final deliverable must include: - A fully editable Adobe Illustrator file - Proper margins, bleed, and print setup At least three rounds of revisions included We are looking for someone who: - Has experience designing restaurant menus or hospitality materials - Can work with an existing brand identity - Has strong layout and typography skills - Can create a design that is pop and premium, but still ve

title: Graphic Designer for B2B Industrial Brochure (Infographics included)
desc: Industrial Brochure Designer (Infographics & B2B Manufacturing) Description: We are looking for an experienced graphic designer to create a professional corporate brochure for an industrial engineering and automation company serving the food manufacturing sector. This is not a typical marketing brochure. We need someone who can transform technical concepts into clean, professional, and visually engaging infographics. The brochure will be used for: • Manufacturing companies • Plant Managers • Engineering Directors • Operations Managers • Production Managers Scope of Work: • Design a professional corporate brochure (approximately 10-12 pages) • Create custom infographics explaining industrial processes and solutions • Present engineering, automation, robotics, material handling, and factory improvement concepts visually • Develop diagrams, process flows, icons, and visual elements • Maintain a premium industrial and corporate style • Prepare final files for both digital distribution and printing Style Reference: We are looking for a design style similar to: • Industrial engineering companies • Automation and robotics suppliers • Manufacturing consulting firms • Professional B2B corporate presentations Requirements: • Proven experience designing B2B industrial brochures • Strong inf

title: Graphic Designer for Emails
desc: Hi! We’re YORK MNGMT – a dynamic wholesale marketplace management company. We work with amazing brands that produce some of the most innovative and fun products out there, and our company is growing quickly! We’re looking for a creative, detail-oriented Email Marketing Designer to join us and help build engaging email templates for a variety of clients. Position Overview: As our new Email Marketing Designer, you’ll create eye-catching email templates for brands across industries like Beauty, Apparel, Pets, Home Decor, and Food & Beverage. This is a fully remote role that offers a chance to showcase your design talents and work with brands that embrace creativity. What We’re Looking For: While direct experience isn’t required, a portfolio is essential – we’d love to see your past work and any email design samples! Design Skills: Graphic Design: Ability to create visually appealing layouts and a strong grasp of design principles. Responsive Design: Knowledge of responsive, mobile-friendly email design is crucial, as many recipients view emails on mobile. Brand Consistency: Ability to maintain a consistent brand voice, tone, and style across different campaigns. Soft Skills: Attention to Detail: Ensuring consistency and accuracy in messaging, links, and design elements. Creativity:

title: Graphic Designer for Social Media Content
desc: Graphic Designer for Premium Social Media Content — Figma & Canva Required We’re looking for a strong graphic designer to support a fast-growing restaurant and social media content agency. We create high-performing content for restaurants, hospitality brands, and consumer-facing businesses. We need a designer who can help us create clean, modern, premium-looking graphics for Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, ads, stories, menus, pitch decks, and brand assets. This role is ideal for someone with strong taste, fast turnaround, and experience designing social-first content. Responsibilities- You may be helping with: Instagram story graphics Reel cover designs Carousel posts Restaurant promotional graphics Menu graphics Event graphics Brand-aligned Canva templates Simple ad creatives Pitch deck / proposal design Light website or landing page visuals in Figma Light photo editing when needed Required Skills You must be proficient in: Figma Canva Typography Layout design Social media design Brand consistency Fast, clean execution Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator are a bonus, but Figma and Canva are the main tools we care about. Design Style We Like We are looking for work that feels: Clean Premium Modern Social-first Scroll-stopping Tasteful Not overly corporate Not overly cluttered Better th

title: Graphic Designer for Sticker Creation
desc: We are seeking a graphic designer to create custom stickers by 2.5 by 2.5 for our 5 oz food product containers. While the container design has already been finalized, the physical containers will not arrive for a few weeks. We need a designer who can use the provided artwork, dimensions, and specifications to create print-ready sticker designs for the front and back of the containers. The goal is to apply these stickers to unprinted 5 oz containers as a temporary packaging solution while we await delivery of our custom-printed containers. This is a short-term project with a quick turnaround. We would like the final designs completed within 2 days. Experience preparing packaging and label artwork for print is preferred.

title: Graphic Designer for Winery Invites
desc: Seeking a creative graphic designer to craft both print and digital invitations for a winery's 40th anniversary celebration. The design should reflect the winery's theme and appeal to a broad audience. Responsibilities include designing visually appealing layouts, ensuring high-quality print and digital formats, and collaborating with the client to incorporate specific elements or branding. The ideal candidate will have experience in both print and digital design, with a strong portfolio showcasing previous work.

title: Graphic Designer – B2B SaaS Website Images (Figma)
desc: We're looking for a graphic designer to help create and polish 10+ images for our B2B SaaS website. These images will live on the homepage and top-level product/vertical pages, so a strong understanding of how website layouts work is important — specifically left/right split designs where your image fills roughly half the page. We have an established brand in Figma, and all work should be done there so the final files live in our system and can be adjusted later. What you'll be working on: We'll share a handful of existing images for you to rework as a starting point, plus a few concepts we'll need to talk through together to land on the right look and feel. You'll be a great fit if you: - Have experience designing for B2B, SaaS, or technical products - Understand how to balance detail and clarity at web scale (nothing too busy or squished) - Are comfortable working within an existing brand system in Figma - Have worked with any of our target verticals: retail, food and beverage, hospitality, franchise businesses, or private equity rollups To apply, please include examples of design work you've done for tech, B2B, SaaS, or any of the verticals listed above.

title: Graphic Designer — Trade Sticker & Print Template Specialist
desc: We are Ocean Prints Ltd, a fast-growing custom print and embroidery company based in Stockport, Greater Manchester. We produce branded garments, stickers and labels, large-format displays, and food packaging for businesses across the UK. We are building a new eCommerce website and need a skilled graphic designer to create a full range of professionally designed, customisable trade sticker templates. These will be used by tradespeople — gas engineers, electricians, PAT testers, fire safety contractors, and others — who customise and order them directly through our website. This is an immediate project with a clearly defined scope. If the quality is right, we have two follow-on projects ready to go: clothing print templates and food packaging artwork — so there is strong potential for an ongoing working relationship.

title: I need a menu designer for print, online, and TV menus for my restaurant.
desc: I need a print, online, and menu board menu designed with certain fields represented in the front and a watermark of our brand in the back. I need certain items to stand out and for the menu to read in a clean easy to understand format, fitting all of the information into 2 pages. We are a fish market and restaurant in California.

title: Ice Cream Festival Presentation Design (From Scratch)
desc: Description: We need a designer to create a visually stunning presentation for a public ice cream festival event in Qatar. Event Details: Event name: Doha Summer Ice Cream Festival 2026 Location: Old Doha Port, Doha, Qatar Dates: July 29 – August 4, 2026 Expected exhibitors: 30+ brands Slides needed (11 slides): Cover – Event name, location, dates Event Overview Organizer Profile – Who We Are / Our Mission / What We Do Venue Description Festival Visuals – How it Will Look (3 slides) Exhibitor Profile – 3 categories: Ice Cream & Gelato / Desserts & Sweet Concepts / Cold Beverages Exhibitor Count Contact Slide Style: Fun, vibrant, summer festival feel. Playful but professional. Deliverables: Editable PowerPoint (.pptx) PDF export Full content will be provided as text after hiring.

title: Indian Restaurant Menu Design
desc: We are seeking a talented designer to create a visually appealing and functional menu for our Indian restaurant. The ideal candidate will have experience in menu design and a keen eye for detail. Responsibilities include designing a menu that reflects the restaurant's theme and cuisine, ensuring it is easy to read and navigate, and incorporating any specific branding elements. The final design should be print-ready and suitable for digital display.

title: Italian Restaurant Marketing Specialist
desc: I'm seeking an experienced marketer to promote my newly opened Italian restaurant. The focus will be on social media and local advertising. Key Requirements: - Develop and manage targeted campaigns on Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok. - Create engaging content including photos, videos, and promotional graphics. - Design and implement local advertising strategies to attract nearby customers. - Monitor and analyze campaign performance, adjusting as necessary to meet goals. Ideal Skills and Experience: - Proven track record in restaurant marketing. - Strong understanding of social media algorithms and advertising. - Excellent graphic design and content creation skills. - Ability to analyze data and adjust strategies accordingly. - Local knowledge of the area is a plus. Please provide samples of previous work and a brief strategy outline.

title: Junk Food Poster Design
desc: We are seeking a talented graphic designer to create a vibrant and eye-catching poster for our junk food brand. The poster should appeal to a wide audience and effectively communicate the brand's message. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and a strong portfolio showcasing their creativity and attention to detail.

title: Lightroom Editor for Food Photography
desc: Quick Turnaround preferred! Lightroom Editor for a food photography shoot. Color correction, white balance, exposure to create a cohesive presentation. 35/40 photos of one subject with flat lay, 45 degree and side shots. Bright and Airy Food Photography is the goal. ASAP deadline. Photos are close to the goal, but need tweaking.

title: Looking for modern catalog designer
desc: We are looking for a designer with a strong editorial publication portfolio. We are producing a premium digital food travel guide (start of a series) — a curated, editorial PDF publication in the spirit of Monocle, Drift and The Hedonist's Guide series by Harper Design, with the design sensibility of Assouline. Restrained, atmospheric, typographically confident with reportage style. We need a freelance catalog designer to develop a complete design system and produce a blad of sample spreads. The system must be modular and scalable across future city editions. Immediate start. Possible phase 2 production scope to be discussed separately upon completion of Phase 1. Deliverables: — Complete design system: typography, grid, colour palette, DPS templates, section opener logic, cover direction — Blad of approximately 16 pages (cover + 8 double page spreads) — All working files in Adobe illustrator What we're looking for: Strong editorial design portfolio essential — food, travel or lifestyle publications preferred, print or digital. Must be proficient in Adobe illustrator. Must be available to start immediately with first review by 1 June 2026. Please share portfolio link and a brief note on relevant editorial experience.
